testcase.name: test_08_set_costo_manual_to_null

failure.message: AssertionError: costo_manual should be None after explicit null set, got 99.99 assert 99.99 is None + where 99.99 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4ae03a4980>('costo_manual') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4ae03a4980> = {'activo': True, 'bom_id': '2a7a6511-89f4-4a2f-a987-745c8df37842', 'cantidad_base': 1.5, 'cantidad_total': 1.5, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_costo_manual_bom.py:239: in test_08_set_costo_manual_to_null assert updated_data.get('costo_manual') is None, \ E AssertionError: costo_manual should be None after explicit null set, got 99.99 E assert 99.99 is None E + where 99.99 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4ae03a4980>('costo_manual') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4ae03a4980> = {'activo': True, 'bom_id': '2a7a6511-89f4-4a2f-a987-745c8df37842', 'cantidad_base': 1.5, 'cantidad_total': 1.5, ...}.get
